title: Brand Identity System
summary: A comprehensive brand identity system for a fintech startup.
description: Developed a complete visual identity including logo, color system, typography, and brand guidelines. The project spanned 6 months and involved extensive research, stakeholder interviews, and iterative design processes.

title: Digital Experience Platform
summary: Redesigning the core user experience for a SaaS platform.
description: Led the UX redesign of a complex B2B platform, improving user satisfaction by 40% and reducing support tickets by 25%. Conducted user research, created wireframes, and built a scalable design system.

title: Immersive Web Experience
description: Built a cutting-edge web experience using WebGL, GSAP, and modern frontend technologies. The site won multiple awards and received over 1 million visits in its first month.

title: Mobile App Redesign
summary: Complete overhaul of a fitness tracking application.
description: Redesigned a popular fitness app with over 5 million users. Focused on simplifying the user journey, improving accessibility, and creating a more engaging visual design.

title: E-commerce Experience
summary: Premium shopping experience for luxury fashion brand.
description: Created an elegant e-commerce experience that reflects the brand's luxury positioning. Implemented advanced filtering, personalized recommendations, and a seamless checkout flow.

title: Data Visualization Dashboard
description: Designed a comprehensive analytics dashboard that transforms complex data into actionable insights. Created custom visualization components and an intuitive filtering system.
